subject: Re: GameStop demo request
body:
Hi Richard,

Following up on Jordan's email. Here are the answers to your intake questions:

1. Contact: Jane Smith, VP Customer Experience (C-suite adjacent)
2. Business area: Customer support for trade-in and repair program
3. Pain points: 45-minute average hold times, 65% annual agent attrition, CSAT dropped from 78 to 62 in Q1
4. Current setup: Genesys Cloud CX for voice/chat, Salesforce Service Cloud for ticketing, Five9 backup IVR

Please also add a stakeholder intel report on Jane.

Thanks,
Michelle

expected.note: Follow-up to existing request - should update existing pipeline row, not create new
